title: Product Popup Detail
description: Rich popup content for supported bus or test application entries (maps to WP ACF supported_bus_table and typical_test_applications_table items)

fields.label: Heading
fields.description: Popup heading displayed at top of detail overlay

fields.label: Details
fields.description: Detailed description of the capability or test application

fields.label: Related Instruments Heading
fields.description: Subheading for the related instruments section

fields.label: Related Instruments
fields.description: HTML list of related instruments for this capability

fields.label: CTA Button Label
fields.description: Label for the call-to-action button in the popup

fields.label: Popup Image
fields.description: Optional image displayed in the popup detail view
